tagline: Turn loose thoughts into done steps.

designSystem.style: Modern productivity app with violet-purple brand identity, soft surface layering, and card-based layout. Features gradient hero strips, dependency chain visualization, and micro-interactions. Dual light/dark themes with harmonized purple-tinted neutrals.

screens: Inbox — AI-captured task feed from voice, screenshots, email, and clipboard with source tagging and linked-chain indicators
Plans — Expandable task chains showing dependency sequences with step locking, progress bars, and context annotations
Focus — Prioritized today view with circular progress ring, tag/priority filters, and one-tap task completion
Settings — Profile card, AI toggles, appearance switcher (light/dark), integrations, and privacy controls
